info.title: Tandem API
info.description: REST API for the Tandem GTD application. Authenticate with a personal API token (Bearer tnm_...) created in Settings → API Tokens. Session-cookie auth is also accepted for browser clients.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of the Tandem server

tags.name: AI
tags.description: AI-powered features (uses user's own API key)

BearerAuth.description: Personal API token (tnm_...). Create one in Settings → API Tokens.

get.description: Returns all tasks for the authenticated user, with optional filters.

patch.description: Pass `id` and optional `version` in the body for optimistic concurrency.

post.summary: Parse natural language into task fields

get.summary: List available tasks (not deferred, not blocked)
Trace cascade chain from task completion

post.summary: Revert task to a previous snapshot
Add a task to a project

patch.summary: Move project under a new parent

post.summary: Create or update a horizon note

get.summary: Get articles that link to this article
Full-text search across tasks, projects, wiki, inbox

post.summary: Upload a file for import preview

get.summary: Get productivity analytics and system health
Get AI context (what should I do now?)
get.description: Returns recommended next actions filtered by context, energy, and available time.

post.description: Suggests task order, types, and dependencies using AI. Uses the user's own AI key.
Streaming SSE endpoint. Uses the user's own AI key.

get.description: Returns token metadata (never exposes hashes or secrets).

post.description: Session-only (no Bearer). Returns the plaintext token exactly once.
